name: opensupport-agentops
description: Tenant-ready ecommerce customer support AgentOps platform based on Chatwoot.

scripts.db:verify: psql "${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://agentops:agentops@localhost:5432/agentops}" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -P pager=off -c "select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema='public' and table_type='BASE TABLE' order by table_name;"

author: Grove-ovo
